summary: The test suite is exceptional and fully satisfies the complex requirements of the task. It employs a multi-layered approach: comprehensive unit/functional tests using bats-core for the logic (Cartesian products, include/exclude rules, size limits) and a sophisticated integration harness (run-tests.sh) that validates the GitHub Actions workflow using act. It strictly adheres to the requested TDD methodology, includes rigorous error-state testing (invalid JSON, size overflows), and ensures code quality via integrated shellcheck and actionlint checks. The use of a temporary git repository for act runs demonstrates high-quality test isolation.
